## 1. Role Justification

The Engine Engineer is a mid-level role focused on physics implementation, audio system integration, and platform SDK work. This is a P1 hire required for Stage 5 (Full Production). The role reports to Viktor Stahl (Senior Engine Engineer, G13), implementing engine features assigned by the senior engineer, integrating platform SDKs, and writing low-level tests.

This hire provides additional implementation capacity for engine-level work, enabling Viktor Stahl to focus on architecture while Nikolai handles implementation details.

**Pipeline Stages Owned:** 3 (Physics/Platform Implementation), 5 (Engine Feature Development), 6 (Code Review Participation)

---

## 2. Required Competencies (weighted)

| Competency                   | Weight | Minimum Threshold | Assessment Method                    |
| ---------------------------- | ------ | ----------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| C++ Low-Level Programming    | 30%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | C++ coding challenge                 |
| Physics Systems              | 25%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | Physics system exercise              |
| Platform SDKs (Android/iOS)  | 20%    | ≥ 3/5             | Platform integration exercise        |
| Mathematics (Linear Algebra) | 15%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | Math/computational geometry exercise |
| Team Collaboration           | 10%    | ≥ 3/5             | Behavioral interview                 |

---

## 3. Must-Have Qualifications

- 2+ years engine/low-level programming experience
- C++ programming with custom data structures
- Physics system implementation (collision detection, rigid body dynamics)
- Platform SDK experience (Android Vulkan, iOS Metal basics)
- Strong applied mathematics background (linear algebra, computational geometry)
